context.role: hungry state when food bowl is empty (food_level = 0), prompts player to feed
context.screen_position: center (x=64, y=60) on perch, gaze directed toward food bowl (lower left)
adjacent_elements: speech bubble with seed icon (upper right)
context.usage_scenario: displayed when food bowl is empty, resolved by feeding action, communicates need for food

visual_specification.shape: cockatiel looking toward food bowl, expectant posture
visual_specification.texture: pixel art with minimal dithering, hand-drawn organic feel
visual_specification.outline: 1px dark outline (#1D2B53) on key features only

animation.description: F1: looking at bowl, F2: head tilt, F3: slight lean toward bowl, F4: return to center

visual_specification.details: head oriented toward food bowl (lower left), eyes focused on bowl, crest in normal position, speech bubble appears above with seed icon (#FFA300), subtle anticipatory lean

relationships.shared_with: all Echo states share same base body structure and color palette
relationships.differences_from: unique directional gaze toward food bowl, speech bubble with seed icon, triggered by empty food bowl condition, resolved by feeding

explicit_negations: no motion blur or tweening between frames
no exaggerated hunger (no stomach growling visuals)
no begging pose (keep dignified bird posture)
